run_summary.summary: Two updates from Friday evening emails: Liz replied to Reach Agency's Spray Paint pitch — confirmed free from exclusivity, budget aligns (~$10-12k), and told Coreyiel she'd be flexible. Ball is now in the agency's court to pitch her profile to the brand client by EOD Mon 4/27. Also: Kenny emailed Ian confirming he and Liz visited Steinhafels and shot content on Apr 23 — Ian extended the Popfly application window to Monday. Content is done, just need the application submitted.

suggestions.message: Content is already shot at Steinhafels! All that's left is applying on Popfly by EOD Monday 4/27. Ian personally confirmed the extension — this is the last chance. Don't let it slip again.

Liz replied to Reach Agency Friday night and confirmed interest. Coreyiel is pitching her profile to the brand by EOD Mon 4/27. If no word by Tuesday, follow up with Coreyiel at coreyiel.ellis@reach.agency.

deals.next_action: Wait for Coreyiel @ Reach Agency to confirm brand's decision after pitching Liz's profile
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Liz replied to Reach Agency pitch — confirmed free from exclusivity, thinks it's a great fit for her page. Budget of $10-12k aligns (her estimate was slightly over $12k but she's flexible). Agency (Coreyiel Ellis, coreyiel.ellis@reach.agency, 504.919.3186) will pitch Liz's profile to the brand client by EOD Mon 4/27. Deliverables: 1 TikTok (syndicated to IG Reels + Pinterest), 1 IG Story set (3 frames), 3 still assets for brand usage. Usage: 5 months (Organic + Paid Social, Website, Retailer, Shopper, CRM). Exclusivity: 2 months in spray paint category. Content launch: August 2026.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Liz responded to Reach Agency — confirmed interest and budget alignment. Now waiting on brand confirmation.

deals.next_action: Apply on Popfly by EOD Monday 4/27 — Ian has extended the deadline
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Ian (ian@popfly.com) confirmed Popfly application window extended to Monday 4/27. Kenny emailed Ian after forgetting to apply when they returned from Steinhafels. Liz and Kenny visited Steinhafels on Apr 23 and shot content — just need to submit the Popfly application now.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Liz + Kenny shot content at Steinhafels on Apr 23. Ian extended Popfly application to Mon 4/27 — must apply before it closes.
